Summary: Auth & Tenant Security
Description: Harden authentication and tenant isolation across all APIs and UIs.

Summary: Bot & Knowledge Core
Description: Bot management, RAG ingestion, crawling, and grounded chat reliability.

Summary: Live Chat & Leads
Description: Human handoff inbox, lead capture, and notification operations.

Summary: Billing & Analytics
Description: Plan upgrades, usage control, and actionable performance reporting.

Summary: Intelligence Expansion
Description: Complete advanced AI capabilities now partially UI-only.

Summary: Mobile & Integrations
Description: Mobile parity and first-party integrations for growth use cases.

Summary: Enforce tenant isolation on all protected endpoints
Description: As a tenant user I can only access my own resources. AC: cross-tenant bot or conversation access returns 404 or 401; add tests for dashboard/chat/ingest/leads/flows.

Summary: Harden JWT validation and session lifecycle
Description: As a user I authenticate with JWT and secure claims. AC: issuer and audience validated; expired or malformed tokens rejected; login contract tests pass.

Summary: Remove insecure auth defaults for production
Description: As platform owner I can run with secure env configuration. AC: startup fails when default password or secret key is unchanged in production profile.

Summary: Add API authorization audit logs
Description: As ops I can trace unauthorized access attempts. AC: structured logs include endpoint, tenant context, and reason for denial.

Summary: Stabilize bot CRUD with full config fields
Description: As admin I can create and update bot identity and behavior. AC: all key fields persist and round-trip via API and dashboard form.

Summary: Public bot endpoint and embeddable widget hardening
Description: As a customer I can embed one script and chat reliably. AC: embed loads bot config, launches iframe, and close signal works.

Summary: Document upload ingestion reliability
Description: As admin I can upload PDF/TXT/MD and index successfully. AC: file parsing errors return clear message; document stored in SQL and vector DB.

Summary: Website crawler dedupe and section indexing quality
Description: As admin I can crawl website content without duplicate inflation. AC: URL normalization and upsert work; section docs indexed with metadata.

Summary: History-aware chat retrieval with fallback
Description: As end user I receive grounded answers even under model quota failure. AC: fallback ledger answer returned on provider failure paths.

Summary: Improve source quality and answer formatting
Description: As user I see concise and clean grounded responses. AC: no raw chunk dumps; answer cleanup and source metadata returned in response.

Summary: Knowledge audit workflow completion
Description: As admin I can audit crawl quality and run test prompts. AC: audit summary loads; bot test runner returns latency and pass or fail result.

Summary: Automated regression for chat and ingest critical paths
Description: As engineering team we prevent regressions. AC: test coverage for upload/crawl/chat fallback and tenant isolation.

Summary: Lead form builder persistence and retrieval
Description: As admin I can configure lead capture form per bot. AC: create/update form API works and dashboard persists fields reliably.

Summary: Lead capture from chat widget
Description: As business user I capture leads from live bot chats. AC: lead saved with bot, conversation, source, and timestamp.

Summary: SMTP email notification reliability for new leads
Description: As operations user I receive lead notifications reliably. AC: tenant email settings saved; send failures logged with retry-safe behavior.

Summary: Live chat inbox filters and message continuity
Description: As agent I manage conversations in one inbox. AC: filter by status/search; message thread reload is consistent and ordered.

Summary: Agent reply workflow and conversation status transitions
Description: As support agent I can send manual replies with status updates. AC: agent messages stored; open and pending transitions reflected in UI.

Summary: Safe bot-level conversation cleanup
Description: As admin I can clear one bot inbox without affecting others. AC: delete endpoint only removes targeted bot conversations and messages.

Summary: Stripe checkout production readiness
Description: As customer I can upgrade plan through Stripe checkout. AC: price mapping validated; clear user error on missing config.

Summary: Stripe webhook signature validation and idempotency
Description: As platform owner I safely process subscription events. AC: signature verified and duplicate webhook handling does not double-update tenant.

Summary: Plan quota enforcement for messages and documents
Description: As tenant I cannot exceed plan limits silently. AC: enforce limits on chat and ingest with clear API errors and UI messaging.

Summary: Settings page usage and upgrade UX refinement
Description: As admin I can monitor limits and initiate upgrade. AC: usage bars accurate and upgrade CTA handles success and failure paths.

Summary: Analytics metric accuracy validation
Description: As manager I trust summary and trend metrics. AC: analytics endpoints validated against fixture data and edge cases.

Summary: Observability dashboards and alerts baseline
Description: As ops I can monitor platform health quickly. AC: Grafana dashboard shows request errors, latency, and key business counters.

Summary: Convert AI Training suggestions from mock to real pipeline
Description: As admin I get FAQ suggestions from real conversations. AC: suggestion service mines recent chats and proposes Q/A pairs.

Summary: Persist and execute agent transfer rules
Description: As support lead I define transfer policies. AC: rules stored server-side and evaluated for keyword, time, and manual trigger paths.

Summary: Integrate transfer rules with live chat workflow
Description: As agent I receive routed conversations with context. AC: transfer event marks conversation state and optional notify action executes.

Summary: Enable action tool governance and auditing
Description: As admin I control which tools the bot can execute. AC: allowlist enforced, tool calls logged, failures gracefully handled.

Summary: Flow runtime integration with chat path
Description: As admin my saved flow influences live responses. AC: flow data is evaluated in runtime for active bot flow nodes.

Summary: Back-end persistence for integrations module
Description: As admin I can save integration credentials and status. AC: API exists for integration configs and dashboard reads or writes actual data.

Summary: Knowledge-grounded AI report using real resolution metrics
Description: As manager I see real AI deflection and transfer stats. AC: remove mock fields and compute from conversation lifecycle data.

Summary: Mobile app JWT login and secure token storage
Description: As mobile user I sign in with real backend authentication. AC: mobile login uses auth API and stores token securely.

Summary: Mobile chat parity with web chat essentials
Description: As mobile user I get consistent chat behavior. AC: conversation continuity, source display, and fallback errors match web behavior.

Summary: Mobile knowledge center parity
Description: As mobile admin I can ingest, crawl, and delete knowledge robustly. AC: endpoints integrated with clear error handling and refresh states.

Summary: Shopify integration MVP for order lookup
Description: As ecommerce user my bot can check order status. AC: integration auth/config and one production action endpoint implemented.

Summary: Slack notifications MVP for leads and transfer events
Description: As support team I receive Slack alerts on key events. AC: webhook integration posts formatted events with retry and logging.

Summary: Release readiness checklist and UAT signoff
Description: As release manager I can deploy with confidence. AC: UAT checklist complete, rollback steps documented, critical tests green.

Summary: Performance and scale baseline tests
Description: As platform owner I know throughput and latency limits. AC: load test report for chat and ingest with tuning recommendations.
